item.caption: Action PresetsMsg 2
item.title: scream
item.text: opens wide eyes and screams excitedly

item.caption: Action PresetsMsg 4
item.title: cough
item.text: coughs loudly trying to get some attention

item.caption: Action PresetsMsg 6
item.title: hug
item.text: gives you a big warm hug

item.caption: Action PresetsMsg 7
item.title: laugh
item.text: laughs hysterically, pounding fists and feet on the ground

item.caption: Action PresetsMsg 9
item.title: ignore
item.text: puts nose in the air making a hmmpf sound, ignoring that remark

item.caption: Action PresetsMsg 12
item.title: flower
item.text: picks a flower and hands it to you

item.caption: Action PresetsMsg 15
item.title: scold
item.text: points finger at you, scolding you for your actions

item.caption: Action PresetsMsg 18
item.title: excuse
item.text: asks to be excused and heads for the toilet
